Simple, transparent pricing

No hidden fees, no long contracts, no sales calls required. Pick the tier that fits and get started today.

Starter

$199

One-time purchase

Static files you host yourself. Works with any web server, any hosting provider. Yours forever.

  • Quick apply (no resume required)
  • Mobile-first responsive design
  • Bullhorn public API integration
  • Custom branding (colors, logo, fonts)
  • Embed on any website (iframe)
  • Schema.org structured data for SEO
  • Source attribution tracking

Most Popular

Standard

$499 /yr

Hosted and managed by Tonic

Everything in Starter, plus LinkedIn sign-in, email notifications, and we handle the hosting.

  • Everything in Starter
  • LinkedIn sign-in (auto-fill name, email)
  • Email notifications on every application
  • Managed hosting with SSL
  • Custom domain support
  • Automatic updates and maintenance
  • Enterprise-grade security (HTTPS, WAF, security headers)
  • Priority email support
Get Started

Pro

$999 /yr

For firms that need the full Bullhorn API

Everything in Standard, plus full Bullhorn REST API access, multi-portal support, and advanced analytics.

  • Everything in Standard
  • Full Bullhorn REST API (read/write any field)
  • Multi-portal (divisions, brands, regions)
  • Analytics dashboard
  • Job alert emails for candidates
  • XML job feeds (Indeed, ZipRecruiter)
  • Custom apply form fields
Preview Your Site

Common questions

What's the difference between Starter and Standard?

Starter gives you static files to host yourself using Bullhorn's public job API. Standard adds LinkedIn sign-in for candidates, email notifications when someone applies, managed hosting with SSL, a custom domain, and automatic updates. You don't have to worry about hosting, security, or maintenance.

Why does Pro cost more?

Pro connects to the full Bullhorn REST API, which means your portal can read and write any field in Bullhorn. That requires a server-side proxy to keep your API credentials secure, and it's a fundamentally different integration than the public API. It also unlocks multi-portal support for firms with multiple divisions, brands, or regions.

Can I upgrade later?

Yes. Start with Starter and upgrade to Standard or Pro anytime. Your portal config and branding carry over. If you started with the $199 one-time purchase, we'll credit that toward your first year of Standard or Pro.

What if I have multiple divisions?

Pro supports unlimited portals under one subscription. Each division gets its own branding, domain, job filters, and apply form. One $999/yr subscription covers all of them.

Do I need a developer to set this up?

No. For Standard and Pro, we handle everything. For Starter, you'll need to upload static files to a web server, but there's no code to write or build pipeline to configure. If you can upload files to a hosting provider, you can set up Starter.

How do you handle security?

Career portals collect candidate PII - names, emails, phone numbers, resumes. Every Tonic-hosted portal runs behind Cloudflare with enforced HTTPS, TLS 1.2+, bot protection, and security headers (CSP, HSTS, referrer policy, permissions policy). API endpoints are no-cache to prevent PII leaking through CDN layers. Many OSCP deployments run on shared hosting without SSL, which means candidate data is transmitted in plaintext. That's a real compliance risk under GDPR and CCPA.

Is there a contract?

No. Standard and Pro are annual subscriptions that you can cancel anytime. Starter is a one-time purchase with no recurring fees. If you cancel Standard or Pro, your portal stays live through the end of your billing period.

See it before you buy it

Preview your career portal with your actual Bullhorn jobs. No signup, no credit card, no sales call.
